headline: T. Rowe Price April AUM Rises 6.7% Sequentially Despite Net Outflows
summary: TROW's April AUM climbed 6.7% to $1.83T as gains in equity and multi-asset products offset $10.6B in net outflows.

raw.headline: T. Rowe Price April AUM Rises 6.7% Sequentially Despite Net Outflows
raw.summary: TROW's April AUM climbed 6.7% to $1.83T as gains in equity and multi-asset products offset $10.6B in net outflows.

headline: Bridgehouse Asset Managers Receives Securityholder Approval for Changes to Its Investment Fund Lineup
summary: Bridgehouse Asset Managers ("Bridgehouse") announces the results of the proposal voted upon today at the special meeting of securityholders announced on March 5, 2026.

headline: Inside PEY’s mixed bag of future aristocrats and fading payers
summary: Invesco High Yield Equity Dividend Achievers ETF (NYSEARCA:PEY) owns the 50 highest-yielding U.S. stocks that have raised their dividend for at least 10 straight years. PEY trades around $22 and has returned roughly 12% over the past year, but the income story is what investors are buying. The question is whether the underlying companies are ... headline: Investors should be hedging inflation risk right now, says T. Rowe Price's Sébastien Page
summary: Sébastien Page, T. Rowe Price head of global multi-asset and CIO, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the latest market trends, how to hedge inflation risk, where investors can find opportunity right now, state of the AI trade, and more.
